name: Garides Tourkolimano (Greek Shrimp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Sprinkle the shrimp with lemon juice and set aside.
3. Melt butter in a large skillet.
4. Saute garlic, green onion tops, and tomato wedges.
5. Add shrimp and season with oregano, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Turn the shrimp frequently and saute until pink.
7. Add feta cheese and cream sherry. Bring to boil and cook 3 to 4 minutes.
8. Remove shrimp carefully to a casserole.
9. Spoon the cheese-sherry mixture over the shrimp.
